name: scorm
description: Static SCORM 1.2 app with in-browser course building, preview, and package export.

scripts.check: npm run test && node --check telemetry.js && node --check course-state.js && node --check scorm.js && node --check course.js && node --check src/scorm_generator/domain/generator-domain.js && node --check src/scorm_generator/application/generate-scorm-use-case.js && node --check src/scorm_generator/infrastructure/scorm-package-builder.js && node --check src/scorm_generator/interfaces/web/scorm-app.js
